Short CV

Shirin Tarbiat was born in 1976 in Ardabil, Iran. She received her bachelor degree in Applied Chemistry from Tehran Azad University, Tehran in 1998. She received the M.S. and Ph.D. degrees in Biochemistry from Mysore University, India in 2008 and 2013 respectively. She worked as a post- doctoral (IFCC Professional Scientific Exchange Program) (PSEP) 2013-2014 at KOC University, Istanbul. She joined Üskudar University in 2015 as a lecturer in faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences.

Shirin Tarbiat has published four international journal papers and five international conference papers. Her research interests include Metabolism of Lipids in complicated healthy disorders such as dyslipidemia, diabetics, atherosclerosis and Obesity. Anti-obesity and antioxidant properties of Medicinal plants.
